root.sql:
select sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date, sc_cls_confirm_data.loan_code, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code_desc, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description, count( sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno ) as c_count, sum( sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance ) as c_balance from sc_cls_confirm_data ,sc_lon_m_rule ,sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code ,sc_acc_m_account_master where sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type and sc_cls_confirm_data.loan_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code and sc_lon_m_rule.account_id = sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_lon_m_rule.invest_status = '0'
/*WHERE*/ --and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = '30/4/2023' group by sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date , sc_cls_confirm_data.loan_code, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code_desc, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description

r_tge_day_balance_by_loan_code_nest.sql: select sc_cls_confirm_mem.mem_type, sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_status_code, count( sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no) as c_count, sum( sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance) as c_amt, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_desc from sc_cls_confirm_mem ,sc_cls_confirm_data ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type where 1=1 and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date and sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no and sc_cls_confirm_mem.mem_type = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance > 0 and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'SHR' /*WHERE*/ and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = {0} GROUP BY sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_status_code, sc_cls_confirm_mem.mem_type, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_desc
